title: Mock OpenAI Provider
objective: A local OpenAI-compatible provider endpoint wired into OpenClaw config so agent turns exercise the real OpenClaw agent path without external model dependencies.

prepare.title: Start Mock OpenAI Provider
prepare.intent: Start a local instrumented OpenAI-compatible server and wait until it is healthy.
commands: mkdir -p '{artifactDir}/mock-openai' && node support/mock-openai-server.mjs --port-file '{artifactDir}/mock-openai/port' --request-log '{artifactDir}/mock-openai/requests.jsonl' --marker KOVA_AGENT_OK >'{artifactDir}/mock-openai/server.log' 2>&1 & echo $! >'{artifactDir}/mock-openai/pid'; for i in $(seq 1 100); do test -s '{artifactDir}/mock-openai/port' && node -e 'fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${process.argv[1]}/health`).then(r=>process.exit(r.ok?0:1)).catch(()=>process.exit(1))' "$(cat '{artifactDir}/mock-openai/port')" && exit 0; sleep 0.1; done; cat '{artifactDir}/mock-openai/server.log' >&2; exit 1

setup.title: Configure OpenClaw Model Provider
setup.intent: Write OpenClaw config pointing the default agent model at the local mock provider.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const port=fs.readFileSync("{artifactDir}/mock-openai/port","utf8").trim(); const state=process.env.OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR || path.join(process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME,".openclaw"); const configPath=process.env.OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH || path.join(state,"openclaw.json"); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(configPath),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(state,".env"),"OPENAI_API_KEY=kova-mock-key\n"); let cfg={}; try { cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(configPath,"utf8")); } catch {} const modelRef="openai/gpt-5.5"; const cost={input:0,output:0,cacheRead:0,cacheWrite:0}; cfg.models={...(cfg.models||{}),mode:"merge",providers:{...(cfg.models?.providers||{}),openai:{...(cfg.models?.providers?.openai||{}),baseUrl:`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1`,apiKey:{source:"env",provider:"default",id:"OPENAI_API_KEY"},api:"openai-responses",request:{...(cfg.models?.providers?.openai?.request||{}),allowPrivateNetwork:true},models:[{id:"gpt-5.5",name:"gpt-5.5",api:"openai-responses",reasoning:false,input:["text"],cost,contextWindow:128000,contextTokens:96000,maxTokens:4096}]}}}; cfg.agents={...(cfg.agents||{}),defaults:{...(cfg.agents?.defaults||{}),model:{primary:modelRef},models:{...(cfg.agents?.defaults?.models||{}),[modelRef]:{params:{transport:"sse",openaiWsWarmup:false}}}}}; fs.writeFileSync(configPath,`${JSON.stringify(cfg,null,2)}\n`); console.log(configPath);'
evidence: OpenClaw config points to mock provider

cleanup.title: Stop Mock OpenAI Provider
cleanup.intent: Stop the host-side mock provider process created for this run.
commands: if test -f '{artifactDir}/mock-openai/pid'; then kill "$(cat '{artifactDir}/mock-openai/pid')" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

setupEvidence: OpenClaw config points to mock provider
